queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the credit amount requested by the applicant as a determinant of reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of checking account status with no checking account on the elevation of credit risk and loan default likelihood.
Determinants of credit risk associated with loan purpose for repairs and their contribution to increased default probability.
